name: Bayer CropScience Limited
summary: Bayer CropScience Limited engages in the manufacture, sale, and distribution of insecticides, fungicides, herbicides, and various other agrochemical products in India. It also provides pharmaceutical products, such as prescription products primarily for cardiology, oncology, gynecology, hematology, and ophthalmology; and diagnostic imaging equipment and other contrast agents. In addition, the company offers consumer health products that are used as a daily health solutions to treat minor illness; and animal health solutions for the prevention and treatment of diseases in companion and farm animals, as well as sells and distributes hybrid seeds. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1958 and is based in Thane, India.
